label: Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning

node.label: Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning
node.definition: Intermediate computation is expanded in tokens, hidden states, or recurrent steps before committing to an answer.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning is to connect Decoder-only causal transformers, Autoregressive decoding to downstream capabilities including Self-consistency & best-of-N inference, Task decomposition & hierarchical reasoning, ReAct-style reasoning and acting.
examples: substrate for Task decomposition & hierarchical reasoning
substrate for ReAct-style reasoning and acting
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Decoder-only causal transformers, Autoregressive decoding.

dependencies.rationale: Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning uses Decoder-only causal transformers as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning uses Autoregressive decoding as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning uses In-context & test-time learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
